basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Principal Project Scientist / Project Scientist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Principal Project Scientist / Project Scientist Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. IITD/IRD/RM00144F/5259 on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist / Project Scientist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Economics, Public Policy, Management or related field, B.Tech./M.Sc./Postgraduate in Economics, Management, Public Policy or related fields
qualification.details: Principal Project Scientist - I: Ph.D. in Economics, Public Policy, Management, or a related field, with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree. Minimum 1 year of research experience. Experience working with large panel, longitudinal or cross-sectional data. Demonstrated ability to perform econometric analysis. Strong programming skills in R or STATA. Project Scientist: B.Tech./M.Sc./Postgraduate in Economics, Management, Public Policy or any related fields having first class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline. Minimum 2 years of research experience. Minimum 2 publications demonstrating research and writing skills. Demonstrated ability to conduct unstructured/semi-structured interviews and transcribe them. Ability to coordinate the setting up of interviews. Availability and willingness to travel as required for project Activities.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 75,600 - 1,01,610/- p.m. plus HRA @ 27% (Principal Project Scientist - I) Rs. 47,790 - 62,350/- plus HRA @ 27% (Project Scientist)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications via email for the IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist / Project Scientist posts is 23 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist / Project Scientist positions. These include one post for Principal Project Scientist - I and one for Project Scientist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Principal Project Scientist - I, a Ph.D. in Economics, Public Policy, Management, or a related field is required. For Project Scientist, a B.Tech./M.Sc./Postgraduate in Economics, Management, Public Policy or related fields is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Principal Project Scientist - I post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Principal Project Scientist - I post ranges from Rs. 75,600 to Rs. 1,01,610/- per month, plus HRA at 27%. This is a consolidated salary structure.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Scientist post ranges from Rs. 47,790 to Rs. 62,350/- per month, plus HRA at 27%. This is a consolidated salary structure.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview. Candidates are advised to prepare well for both stages.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. They should prepare their application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly state an age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any specific age criteria or relaxation applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
